other_observers: I was the only one there;
description: there was a flock on a mound, some were swimming around; approx 30 birds. Looks like there were both male and female, some breeding, along with adult chicks. They were mostly sleeping/resting. I have pictors if you would likeBehaviors: sleeping/ resting some swiming around. When I sppoked them started to fly but soon landed and was not intersed in me.Call: don't knowPlumage: black speckled head yellow tuff white
